sections.paragraph:
fut. יִלְטשׁ-

(1) to hammer, to forge, Gen 4:22.

(2) to sharpen by hammering, e.g. a ploughshare, 1Sa 13:20 a sword, Psa 7:13. Metaph. Job 16:9, יִלְטֹושׁ עֵינָיו לִי “he sharpens his eyes against me,” he watches me with stern and threatening eyes.

Pual, part. sharp, Psa 52:4.

Derivative, pr.n. לְטוּשִׁם.
